blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the business value of observability for Azure infrastructure monitoring
- Learned the advantages of using Cloud Provider Observability for unified Azure monitoring
- Navigated to the Azure configuration interface in Cloud Provider Observability
- Created an Azure service principal with appropriate permissions for secure metric collection
- Connected your Azure account to Grafana Cloud using service principal authentication
- Configured automatic metric discovery for your Azure resources
- Verified data was collected and sent to Grafana Cloud
- Installed preconfigured Azure dashboards and alerts
- Explored Azure service data using pre-built dashboards and analysis tools

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
- [Explore logs using Logs Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-logs/)
